activities.details: The simple task of looking for Bob got a little more complex. It seems that Bob may - or may not - have been Robert the Strong, a fearsome hero of years past.
activities.text: Quest complete: A Tail of Two Cats

activities.details: I levelled my Agility skill, I am now level 57.
I levelled my Woodcutting skill, I am now level 27.
I was being controlled through visions, but my mind is my own again, after the god of the dead intervened with the Devourer's mind control.
I levelled my Cooking skill, I am now level 38.
Completing Gertrude's Cat has given me enough Quest Points to pass the 50 QP milestone.
Gertrude's cat, the little scamp, had made its way to an abandonded house in Varrock! Still, I rescued it, and its kittens are now safe and sound.

Ozan and I stole the Kharid-ib to pay for Prince Ali's release. On our way to the handover, we were waylaid by bandits, quicksand, kalphites and the kidnapper's bodyguards. Ali was safely returned home and is now Al Kharid's new Emir.
activities.text: Quest complete: Diamond in the Rough

activities.details: Ozan and I stumbled across a plot to kidnap Prince Ali. The kidnappers got away, so we delivered the ransom to the Emir of Al Kharid, but he wasn't willing to pay the price...
